name: Roza - Gunsaw
description:
"I hate this so much..."

Roza from Gunsaw

First gunsaw bot got an update!
-Added 1 new starting message and a "Make your own scenario" Starting message.
-Tweaked some things in the character's definition.
I will try adding more starting messages to more of my bots and perhaps tweaking any imperfections in the definitions of my old ones.

One of the 14 Gunsaw playable characters, Roza is my favourite, so I made her first.

This one is very very sisterly. And uhh... kind... yeah.

Because there is no game wiki (yet) I literally had to do evil scientific experiments on them in-game to learn more about em'.

Her chat Name Is Volga to prevent character from calling themselves, and only themselves, their subspecies name. Also kinda like her having the name "Volga", kind of fits her.

Also because of the name the bot is canonica;ly Russian.
creator: ItsBastion
